# Duni Porter, MS, LPC – Child Therapist

![Duni-Porter-MS-LPC](https://www.change-well.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/1128/2025/08/Bio-Duni-Porter-MS-LPC-e1755189936558-300x298.jpg)**Duni has a Masters of Science from Southern Methodist University in Dallas, Texas.**

She is a compassionate therapist dedicated to supporting the mental and emotional well-being of children, adolescents, and adults. With a client-centered approach, Duni helps individuals navigate life’s challenges, including anxiety, depression, behavioral concerns, life transitions, and family dynamics.

Drawing from evidence-based practices such as Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), play therapy, narrative therapy, mindfulness, and solution-focused interventions, Duni tailors each session to meet the unique needs of her clients. With younger children, she often uses creative, developmentally appropriate tools to encourage emotional expression and build coping skills, while with adolescents and adults, she focuses on empowering clients to develop insight, resilience, and healthy relationships.

Duni is known for creating a warm, nonjudgmental therapeutic space where clients of all ages and backgrounds feel heard, supported, and respected. Whether working with a child struggling in school, a teen facing identity questions, or an adult managing stress and trauma, Duni is committed to walking alongside each client on their journey toward healing and growth.

## Footer

![Change-Well.com](https://www.change-well.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/1128/2020/02/Change-Well-Logo-White-01.png)

Find help in person or through teletherapy (video conferencing) for Depression, Anxiety or Fears, ADHD and other mental health diagnoses, Relationship and Marriage Counseling, Trauma and PTSD, Couples Therapy, Family Therapy, High Conflict Divorce, Individuals Recovering from Parental Alienation, and Life Transitions, for healthier living, better balance and overall wellness. Obtain an accurate diagnosis/diagnosis clarification, a psychological report or assessment for upcoming surgery or for your prescribing physician or psychiatrist.
